LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SMG EXTOL, INC. DBA DIRECT LINE COMMUNICATIONS' MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT BY STIPULATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMG EXTOL, INC. DBA DIRECT LINE COMMUNICATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED GROWTH, LLC $45,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,804.54 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $51,954.54, SEE SCANNED DOC

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF SMG EXTOL, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $48,888.48. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE UNDERTAKING IS SET IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.
